response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, with notable contributions to tooling and open-source projects, but lacks clear, recent, or deep involvement with JVM ecosystems, Spring, or enterprise IDE tooling — key requirements for this role. His Java exposure is mentioned briefly and buried in older roles, with no evidence of IDE internals or JVM-level optimization work.
strengths: Strong full-stack and systems engineering background with diverse tech exposure
Proven track record in open-source tooling and developer-focused projects
Excellent communication and workshop leadership skills
concerns: Minimal recent or demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin JVM tooling or IDE internals
No clear evidence of work with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise build systems
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not JVM-based enterprise tooling
